scripts.dev:server: php backend/bin/console lexik:jwt:generate-keypair --skip-if-exists && php backend/bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate --no-interaction && php backend/bin/console app:ensure-admin && php -S localhost:3001 -t backend/public backend/public/router.php
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.start: php backend/bin/console lexik:jwt:generate-keypair --skip-if-exists && php backend/bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate --no-interaction && php backend/bin/console app:ensure-admin && php -S localhost:3001 -t backend/public backend/public/router.php
